name: gossiptoon-v2-monorepo
description: Gossiptoon V2 - Next.js frontend with Python FastAPI backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && run.bat" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:resume: concurrently "cd backend && run.bat" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:test: cd backend && python setup_test_data.py && cd .. && npm run dev:resume
scripts.kill: lsof -ti:8000,3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'Servers stopped (data preserved)'
